name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We predict cash flow and notify teams instead of manual tracking of invoices and payments.
problem_solved: Late payments causing cash flow gaps

locked_fields.primary_problem: Late payments causing cash flow gaps
